title: stichorkis distichis
intro: Stichorkis distichis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stichorkis distichis include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as being used as a treatment for respiratory issues and wounds. Herbal preparations of Stichorkis distichis can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or using it in a decoction, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
